# velia_server (Data Source)

Reads data about a Velia server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "velia_server" "example" {
  id = 12345
}

output "server_ip" {
  value = data.velia_server.example.server_ip
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Server ID.

### Read-Only

- `cancelled` (String) Date the server was cancelled (YYYY-MM-DD), if applicable.
- `city` (String) Data center city.
- `country` (String) Data center country (ISO 3166-1 code).
- `device_type` (String) Device sub-type.
- `ipmi_ip` (String) IPMI IP address.
- `issued` (String) Date the server was issued (YYYY-MM-DD).
- `label` (String) Custom label assigned to the server.
- `networks` (List of String) CIDR networks assigned to the server.
- `online` (Boolean) Whether the server is currently online.
- `product` (String) Product name (e.g. HP DL360).
- `server_ip` (List of String) IP addresses assigned to the server.
- `status` (String) Server status: used or expiring.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags describing hardware components.
- `ticket` (Number) Order ticket number.
- `type` (String) Device type.
